name: netsuite-suiteql
description: Schema-aware NetSuite SuiteQL querying via the API Gateway. Includes full table/column/FK schema (2042 tables, 19363 columns) and reference docs. Ask natural language questions about NetSuite data — Claude automatically looks up the schema and generates correct SuiteQL.

api_key.title: Gateway API Key
api_key.description: X-API-Key for gateway authentication. Contact your NetSuite admin for the key.

netsuite_account.title: NetSuite Account
netsuite_account.description: Account to query: 'twistedx' (Twisted X, account 4829859) or 'dutyman' (Dutyman, account 8055418). Default: twistedx

netsuite_environment.title: NetSuite Environment
netsuite_environment.description: Environment: 'production', 'sandbox', or 'sandbox2'. Dutyman only supports production and sandbox. Default: production

tools.name: netsuite_run_suiteql
tools.description: Execute a raw SuiteQL SELECT query against NetSuite. Always describe the table first to verify column names.

tools.name: netsuite_describe_table
tools.description: Show all columns, data types, FK relationships, and custom field labels for a NetSuite table. Use BEFORE writing any query.

tools.name: netsuite_search_schema
tools.description: Search all NetSuite table and column names for a keyword pattern. Use when unsure which table contains your data.

tools.name: netsuite_list_tables
tools.description: List NetSuite SuiteQL tables matching a glob pattern (e.g. 'custom*', 'Transaction*', '*edi*').

tools.name: netsuite_show_relationships
tools.description: Show foreign key relationships for a table — which tables it references and which reference it. Use to plan JOINs.

tools.name: netsuite_refresh_custom_schema
tools.description: Refresh the custom records and custom fields cache from NetSuite via the gateway. Run when new custom record types have been added.

tools.name: netsuite_query_examples
tools.description: Search the built-in query pattern library for examples matching a keyword (e.g. 'customer', 'transaction', 'inventory').
